title: Just Enough Armour (Reforged)
description: Just Enough Armour Adds All The Armour NO ONE ASKED FOR! (except me :)hehehe)
body:
# Just Enough Armour
**Simple, Yet Admittidly COOL Armour Sets for Minecraft**

## Features
New Armour Sets: Adds various new armour options

Easy Crafting: Simple recipes for each set

Balanced Gameplay: Still Feels Minecrafty

Mod Friendly: Compatible with other forge mods such as embeddium or create (reforged)

## Jar Installation 
Install Minecraft Forge 

Place the Jar file in the "mods" folder

Launch Minecraft

## Modrinth Launcher Install
Open Modrinth

Create A New Modpack (forge 1.20.x)
Search For "Just Enough Armour
(Reforged)"

Click "Install"

Run The Modpack

Play!

## TIP: Report Any Bugs On Our [Bug Tracker](https://github.com/gamerbenyt/justenougharmour/issues)
And If You Can, Please Tell Us What Hardware You Were Using, And How To Recreate The Bug!

### HAVE FUN!
